placement_rules: Use professional portraits in the hero/about area when available.
A supplied professional portrait is mandatory in the hero and must never be demoted to a gallery-only image.
Use logos and brand marks as brand anchors, never as blurry generic placeholders.
Use certificates in an achievements/gallery context, not as generic marketing cards.
Use project, robotics, conference, screenshot, and media assets near the matching story section.
If an image is privacy-sensitive or irrelevant, omit it only when the quality validator can explain why.

site_archetype.directive: Restaurant/cafe site: immersive full-bleed food photography hero, warm inviting tone, menu highlights and hours/location front and center, reservation or ordering as the dominant call to action.

dynamic_sections.label: Coffee, Cuisine & Favorites
notes: Isa Coffee Lounge Isa Coffee Lounge Restaurant / Café .
Today, Isa is known for premium coffee, carefully prepared café dishes, attentive service, and an atmosphere guests look forward to returning to.
Coffee remains at the center of the brand, with premium beans and careful craftsmanship used across classic espresso drinks, signature cappuccinos, and seasonal specialties.
Coffee & Beverages.
Premium Espresso Beverages - Classic espresso-based drinks prepared with premium beans.
Breakfast & Savory.
Gourmet Breakfast Selections - Refined breakfast options inspired by European café traditions.
Artisan Pastries - Fresh pastry selections designed to pair with coffee.

brand_dna.color_direction: Use #5A3A22 and #F5EFE6 as the signature palette with premium neutral space.
brand_dna.typography: Large confident display type, compact supporting labels, readable body copy.
brand_dna.spacing_philosophy: Generous breathing room with dense, intentional cards only where useful.
brand_dna.animation_philosophy: Tasteful scroll reveals, hover depth, and restrained motion that clarifies hierarchy.
brand_dna.photography_philosophy: Images are storytelling devices placed near the concept they support.
brand_dna.shape_language: Crisp cards, pill CTAs, layered panels, subtle glass depth.
brand_dna.interaction_philosophy: Every action is a premium button; every hover state communicates affordance.

visual_language.name: Warm hospitality editorial
visual_language.rationale: Restaurant/cafe site: immersive full-bleed food photography hero, warm inviting tone, menu highlights and hours/location front and center, reservation or ordering as the dominant call to action.

ux_storyboard: identity-first hero with clear memory hook
trust and process build buyer confidence
media reinforces the story instead of decorating it
premium contact panel closes with clear next actions

layout_blueprint.section_rhythm: CafeHero -> QuickOrderActions -> FoodGalleryMasonry -> ReviewCarousel -> HoursAndLocation -> ContactCafePanel

motion_plan: subtle button hover lift, maximum two pixels
short soft section highlight after anchor navigation

must_include_facts: Isa Coffee Lounge Isa Coffee Lounge Restaurant / Café .
Isa Coffee Lounge was created as a sophisticated destination where exceptional coffee, refined food, and meaningful conversation come together.

Located in Recife's thriving business district, the café welcomes professionals, entrepreneurs, travelers, and local guests into a warm, elegant setting designed for breakfast, meetings, focused work, relaxation, and social gatherings.
Its concept combines Portuguese, Spanish, and French culinary inspiration with the warmth of Brazilian hospitality.
Today, Isa is known for premium coffee, carefully prepared café dishes, attentive service, and an atmosphere guests look forward to returning to.
Coffee remains at the center of the brand, with premium beans and careful craftsmanship used across classic espresso drinks, signature cappuccinos, and seasonal specialties.
Coffee & Beverages.
Signature Cappuccinos - Rich, carefully crafted cappuccinos that are frequently praised by guests.
Premium Espresso Beverages - Classic espresso-based drinks prepared with premium beans.
Breakfast & Savory.
Gourmet Breakfast Selections - Refined breakfast options inspired by European café traditions.
Sweet Potato Coxinha - A distinctive savory favorite praised for its flavor.
Pastries & Desserts.
Artisan Pastries - Fresh pastry selections designed to pair with coffee.
Strawberry Cake - A soft, memorable dessert that guests describe as melting in the mouth.
Reviews & Recognition "I was pleasantly surprised by this café.
The coffee was generously sized, and the atmosphere was cozy and beautifully decorated.
The sweet potato coxinha was absolutely delicious." - Niedja Tenorio "Great food, excellent service, and an incredibly pleasant atmosphere.
Everything is outstanding.
It has already become my favorite place." - Sarah Noemi.

Isa Coffee Lounge | "The cappuccino was outstanding, the strawberry cake melted in my mouth, and the experience exceeded my expectations." - Wesley Cavalcante Soares Audience, Goals & Tone The website should appeal to professionals, entrepreneurs, travelers,.
The primary actions should be to view the menu, confirm hours and location, visit the café, follow Isa on Instagram, and learn about the brand's planned expansion to New York City.
The tone should feel elegant, warm, modern, trustworthy, and welcoming rather than formal or exclusive.
Visual Assets Checklist.
Logo: The official Isa Coffee Lounge logo in high-resolution transparent PNG and vector formats.
Coffee photography: Signature cappuccinos, espresso beverages, and seasonal specialties.
cake, and handcrafted desserts.

facts.value: Isa Coffee Lounge Isa Coffee Lounge Restaurant / Café .
Isa Coffee Lounge was created as a sophisticated destination where exceptional coffee, refined food, and meaningful conversation come together.

Located in Recife's thriving business district, the café welcomes professionals, entrepreneurs, travelers, and local guests into a warm, elegant setting designed for breakfast, meetings, focused work, relaxation, and social gatherings.
Its concept combines Portuguese, Spanish, and French culinary inspiration with the warmth of Brazilian hospitality.
Today, Isa is known for premium coffee, carefully prepared café dishes, attentive service, and an atmosphere guests look forward to returning to.
Coffee remains at the center of the brand, with premium beans and careful craftsmanship used across classic espresso drinks, signature cappuccinos, and seasonal specialties.
Coffee & Beverages.
Signature Cappuccinos - Rich, carefully crafted cappuccinos that are frequently praised by guests.
Premium Espresso Beverages - Classic espresso-based drinks prepared with premium beans.
Breakfast & Savory.
Gourmet Breakfast Selections - Refined breakfast options inspired by European café traditions.
Sweet Potato Coxinha - A distinctive savory favorite praised for its flavor.
Pastries & Desserts.
Artisan Pastries - Fresh pastry selections designed to pair with coffee.
Strawberry Cake - A soft, memorable dessert that guests describe as melting in the mouth.
Reviews & Recognition "I was pleasantly surprised by this café.
The coffee was generously sized, and the atmosphere was cozy and beautifully decorated.
The sweet potato coxinha was absolutely delicious." - Niedja Tenorio "Great food, excellent service, and an incredibly pleasant atmosphere.
Everything is outstanding.
It has already become my favorite place." - Sarah Noemi.

Isa Coffee Lounge | "The cappuccino was outstanding, the strawberry cake melted in my mouth, and the experience exceeded my expectations." - Wesley Cavalcante Soares Audience, Goals & Tone The website should appeal to professionals, entrepreneurs, travelers,.
The primary actions should be to view the menu, confirm hours and location, visit the café, follow Isa on Instagram, and learn about the brand's planned expansion to New York City.
The tone should feel elegant, warm, modern, trustworthy, and welcoming rather than formal or exclusive.
Visual Assets Checklist.
Logo: The official Isa Coffee Lounge logo in high-resolution transparent PNG and vector formats.
Coffee photography: Signature cappuccinos, espresso beverages, and seasonal specialties.
cake, and handcrafted desserts.

notes: Isa Coffee Lounge Isa Coffee Lounge Restaurant / Café .
Isa Coffee Lounge was created as a sophisticated destination where exceptional coffee, refined food, and meaningful conversation come together.

Located in Recife's thriving business district, the café welcomes professionals, entrepreneurs, travelers, and local guests into a warm, elegant setting designed for breakfast, meetings, focused work, relaxation, and social gatherings.
Today, Isa is known for premium coffee, carefully prepared café dishes, attentive service, and an atmosphere guests look forward to returning to.
Coffee remains at the center of the brand, with premium beans and careful craftsmanship used across classic espresso drinks, signature cappuccinos, and seasonal specialties.
Coffee & Beverages.
Premium Espresso Beverages - Classic espresso-based drinks prepared with premium beans.
Breakfast & Savory.
Gourmet Breakfast Selections - Refined breakfast options inspired by European café traditions.
Artisan Pastries - Fresh pastry selections designed to pair with coffee.

identity.name: Isa Coffee Lounge
identity.experience_model: Isa Coffee Lounge was created as a sophisticated destination where exceptional coffee, refined food, and meaningful conversation come together.

facts.value: Isa Coffee Lounge Isa Coffee Lounge Restaurant / Café .
Isa Coffee Lounge was created as a sophisticated destination where exceptional coffee, refined food, and meaningful conversation come together.

Located in Recife's thriving business district, the café welcomes professionals, entrepreneurs, travelers, and local guests into a warm, elegant setting designed for breakfast, meetings, focused work, relaxation, and social gatherings.
Its concept combines Portuguese, Spanish, and French culinary inspiration with the warmth of Brazilian hospitality.
Today, Isa is known for premium coffee, carefully prepared café dishes, attentive service, and an atmosphere guests look forward to returning to.
Coffee remains at the center of the brand, with premium beans and careful craftsmanship used across classic espresso drinks, signature cappuccinos, and seasonal specialties.
Coffee & Beverages.
Signature Cappuccinos - Rich, carefully crafted cappuccinos that are frequently praised by guests.
Premium Espresso Beverages - Classic espresso-based drinks prepared with premium beans.
Breakfast & Savory.
Gourmet Breakfast Selections - Refined breakfast options inspired by European café traditions.
Sweet Potato Coxinha - A distinctive savory favorite praised for its flavor.
Pastries & Desserts.
Artisan Pastries - Fresh pastry selections designed to pair with coffee.
Strawberry Cake - A soft, memorable dessert that guests describe as melting in the mouth.
Reviews & Recognition "I was pleasantly surprised by this café.
The coffee was generously sized, and the atmosphere was cozy and beautifully decorated.
The sweet potato coxinha was absolutely delicious." - Niedja Tenorio "Great food, excellent service, and an incredibly pleasant atmosphere.
Everything is outstanding.
It has already become my favorite place." - Sarah Noemi.

Isa Coffee Lounge | "The cappuccino was outstanding, the strawberry cake melted in my mouth, and the experience exceeded my expectations." - Wesley Cavalcante Soares Audience, Goals & Tone The website should appeal to professionals, entrepreneurs, travelers,.
The primary actions should be to view the menu, confirm hours and location, visit the café, follow Isa on Instagram, and learn about the brand's planned expansion to New York City.
The tone should feel elegant, warm, modern, trustworthy, and welcoming rather than formal or exclusive.
Visual Assets Checklist.
Logo: The official Isa Coffee Lounge logo in high-resolution transparent PNG and vector formats.
Coffee photography: Signature cappuccinos, espresso beverages, and seasonal specialties.
cake, and handcrafted desserts.

progress_stage_events.user_facing_message: Read the saved upload and supporting material.
Identified the current entity, audience, and visitor goals.
Built the source-grounded semantic entity graph.
Ranked evidence by visitor and business value.
Selected the visual journey through place and offering narrative strategy.
Generated independent navigation, hero, rhythm, card, media, type, and motion rules.
Composed the selected sections from reusable visual primitives.
Assigned semantic roles to 9 supplied images.
Prepared concise public copy with one plain-text normalization boundary.
Verified internal and external action targets.
Verified semantic contrast tokens and automatic corrections.
Compared the rendered structure with recent generations.
